brand_identity.name: Yashoda Total Solution
brand_identity.mission: To provide accessible legal and financial assistance to common people, ensuring justice and financial security.
brand_identity.tone: Trustworthy, Professional, Empathetic, Simple, Authoritative but Accessible
brand_identity.target_audience: Common citizens, rural/semi-urban residents, individuals seeking claim assistance. Mobile-first users.

font_family.body: Noto Sans, Noto Sans Devanagari, sans-serif

images.description: Close up handshake over papers - Symbolizes agreement, settlement, and trust.
images.usage: Home Page Hero or About Us Section

images.description: Happy Indian family in rural context.
Clean desk with notebooks and pen.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F7A4A] hover:bg-[#0b5e38] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-md font-semibold text-lg transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F39C12] hover:bg-[#d68910] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-md font-semibold text-lg transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0F7A4A] text-[#0F7A4A] hover:bg-[#0F7A4A] hover:text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md border border-gray-100 flex flex-col items-start gap-4 transition-all duration-300
cards.testimonial_card: bg-white p-6 rounded-lg shadow-sm border-l-4 border-[#F39C12]

navigation.wrapper: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

forms.input: w-full p-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F7A4A] focus:border-transparent bg-gray-50
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1

layout_rules.grid_system: Use simple grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8
layout_rules.mobile_first: Ensure all tap targets are at least 44px. Text should not be smaller than 16px on mobile.
layout_rules.alignment: Left align text for readability. Center align headings only in 'Hero' or 'Section Features'.

multilingual_support.strategy: Use a context provider to manage 'lang' state (en, hi, mr). Ensure text content is loaded dynamically based on selection.
multilingual_support.fonts: Import 'Noto Sans Devanagari' from Google Fonts to ensure Hindi and Marathi render beautifully.

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY NO GRADIENTS: Use solid colors as defined.
Target Audience is rural/semi-urban: Keep language simple and UI elements large and clear.
Trust is key: Use the handshake images and official-looking typography.
Implement the 'Language Switcher' in the Navbar prominently.
Use Lucide-React icons for services (e.g., Gavel for Legal, Shield for Insurance, Banknote for Banking).
Ensure the contact form is very simple (Name, Phone, Issue). Phone number validation is important.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic AI-style centered layouts. Use split screens or card grids.
Keep CSS clean and use Tailwind utility classes.
